workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier contract
workloads.description: Directional P0 contract workload for pipeline-layout/render-pass pixel-local-storage chains plus explicit barrier invocation.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Exercises Fawn P0 pixel-local-storage API path: pipeline-layout PLS descriptor chain, render-pass PLS storage-attachment chain, and RenderPassEncoderPixelLocalStorageBarrier under non-coherent feature gating.

timingNormalization.note: Directional PLS contract: normalize per diagnostic iteration over 100 repeated non-coherent barrier command sequences.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier macro (500)
workloads.description: Directional macro PLS workload with 500 in-command iterations to stress non-coherent barrier sequencing overhead.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: no direct Dawn perf-suite PLS barrier benchmark contract; mapped to DrawCallPerf for runtime plumbing parity checks.

timingNormalization.note: Directional macro PLS contract: normalize per in-command iteration over 500 barrier-guarded render-pass loops.
